privileged_info_summary: The task uses the authentic Universal Declaration of Human Rights (UDHR) Preamble and Articles 1-5, obtained from the official UN sources. The source document contains 20 text blocks (1 title, 1 preamble heading, 8 preamble paragraphs, 5 article headings, 5 article paragraphs) which will generate approximately 88-100 paragraphs when artificially corrupted with hard line breaks at 55 characters and hyphenated word splits. The expected cleaned document should contain 10-25 paragraphs. Seven of eight listed 'broken_words_to_fix' are verified to appear in the text (declaration, fundamental, jurisdiction, distinction, inalienable, conscience, brotherhood). However, 'proclamation' is contradicted: the actual text contains the verb 'proclaims' not the noun 'proclamation'. All heading style assignments are verified correct: Title for main heading, Heading 1 for Preamble, Heading 2 for Articles 1-5.
